atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain following a fall while changing a light bulb.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes pain with knee flexion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes pain with twisting the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness over the medial aspect of the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: There is mild swelling and tenderness with valgus stressing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has an acute medial meniscus sprain or strain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a knee brace and crutches for temporary use.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Recommend Motrin 800mg every 6 hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in one week to reassess and consider an MRI if symptoms persist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes digoxin for atrial fibrillation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-rays show no fractures but some fluid in the knee.
